title: 雨上がりの太陽と共に第5話　最高の夏

script.text: ――ライブイベント当日

translations.en: ――On the day of the live event

script.text: 沖縄のみんな、こんにちはー！　サニーピースでーす！

translations.en: Hello everyone in Okinawa! We’re Sunny Peace!

script.text: 暑い中、ステージに集まってくれてありがとう！

translations.en: Thank you all for coming for our show‚ even in this heat!

script.text: 今日は快晴……

translations.en: It’s a sunny day…

script.text: 絶好のライブ日和……！

translations.en: Perfect weather for a show!

script.text: 昨日は雨が降ってたから

translations.en: It was raining yesterday‚

script.text: 野外ステージで歌えるか心配だったけど……

translations.en: so we were worried about singing on an outdoor stage.

script.text: みんな知ってましたか？

translations.en: Did you know?

script.text: 晴れた気持ちでいれば天気も晴れるんですよ

translations.en: If you’re in a sunny mood‚ the weather will be sunny too.

script.text: ほら、こんな風に！

translations.en: Watch‚ just like this!

script.text: サニーピースの真夏の沖縄ライブ、始めるよ！

translations.en: Sunny Peace’s midsummer Okinawa show starts now!

script.text: 夏の青空にぴったりな私達の新曲、聴いて下さい！

translations.en: This is our new song‚ which is perfect for the blue summer sky!

script.text: 『サマー♡ホリデイ』！

translations.en: “Summer Holiday!”

script.text: えらい盛り上がってはるなぁ

translations.en: They're gettin' real fired up‚ y'all.

script.text: うちも客引きした甲斐がありましたわ

translations.en: It was worth all the work attractin' them fans‚ I reckon.

script.text: ライブの宣伝になるかと思て

translations.en: I changed into this outfit 'cause I thought

script.text: 衣装を着させてもらったけど

translations.en: it'd be a good way to promote the show‚

script.text: こんな格好でおったら、うちも歌いたくなってまうわ

translations.en: but dressin' like this‚ it's makin' me wanna sing too.

script.text: ……みんな、ライブがうまくいって良かったなぁ

translations.en: It's mighty great that the show went so well.

script.text: それにしてもほんまにええ天気や

translations.en: And the weather's just perfect.

script.text: 今日は暑くなりそうやな……

translations.en: Looks like it's gonna get even hotter today…

script.text: それでは、野外ライブの成功を祝って――

translations.en: So‚ to celebrate the success of our outdoor live…

script.text: かんぱーい！！

translations.en: Cheers!!!

script.text: 沖縄の海を眺めながら美味しいものを食べるなんて

translations.en: Eating great food while looking at the Okinawan sea

script.text: 最高だね～

translations.en: is just the best…

script.text: ライブの打ち上げでバーベキューなんて

translations.en: A barbecue to celebrate after the show

script.text: {user}さんも粋なことするわ

translations.en: is a cool idea from {user}-san.

script.text: ちなみにこのビーチは別荘の敷地内やから

translations.en: By the way‚ this beach is on the grounds of our holiday villa‚

script.text: 人目を気にせず騒いでも大丈夫やで

translations.en: so y'all can get rowdy without worryin' 'bout anyone seein' ya.

script.text: プライベートビーチ最高……

translations.en: There’s nothing better than a private beach…

script.text: 優ちゃんがいてくれてよかった……

translations.en: I’m glad you’re here‚ Yu-chan.

script.text: そう言ってもらえるとうちも嬉しいわ

translations.en: And I'm real happy to hear y'all say that.

script.text: あ、うちホタテ食べたい！

translations.en: Oh‚ I wanna eat some scallops!

script.text: 私はイカを……

translations.en: I want squid!

script.text: 焼きそば……

translations.en: Fried noodles!

script.text: はいはい、すぐに焼くからちょっと待っててね

translations.en: Yes‚ yes‚ it’ll all be cooked soon‚ so just wait for a little.

script.text: ちょっとあなた達

translations.en: Hey‚ all of you!

script.text: 全部遙子さんにやらせないで、自分でも焼きなさい

translations.en: Don’t leave everything for Haruko-san to cook. Do some yourselves too.

script.text: いいのよ。私がやりたくてやってるんだから

translations.en: It’s okay. I’m doing it because I want to.

script.text: 美味しそうに食べる顔を見てるだけで、私は嬉しいわ

translations.en: I’m happy just to see everyone’s faces as they enjoy the food.

script.text: 遙子さんはサニピのお母さんやな～

translations.en: Haruko-san‚ you're like a mother to Sunny Peace.

script.text: そこはお姉さんと言ってほしいわ……

translations.en: I’d rather you said “big sister”…

script.text: 佐伯遙子、十七歳です

translations.en: Haruko Saeki‚ aged 17!

script.text: ごちそうさま～！　バーベキュー楽しかった～！

translations.en: Thanks for cooking for us! The barbecue was fun.

script.text: お粗末様でした

translations.en: It wasn’t anything special.

script.text: 片付けが終わったら別荘に戻りましょうか

translations.en: Once everything’s cleaned up‚ let’s get back to the villa.

script.text: なに言うてんの、まだまだ遊び足りひんやろ

translations.en: What in tarnation are ya sayin'? We ain't played nearly enough.

script.text: せっかくの沖縄やしもっと夏を楽しまな

translations.en: We're here in Okinawa. We should be enjoyin' summer more!

script.text: でもさすがに今から海で遊ぶのは……

translations.en: But playing in the sea now would be…

script.text: 大丈夫……

translations.en: I’m okay…

script.text: みんなで遊べるものを持って来た……

translations.en: I brought something we can all have fun with…

script.text: それは……花火？

translations.en: Are those… fireworks?

script.text: 花火、沢山種類があるね

translations.en: Fireworks‚ all kinds of them.

script.text: どれにするか迷うなあ

translations.en: I don’t know which kind to start with.

script.text: ロケット花火とドラゴン花火……

translations.en: Rockets and Dragons…

script.text: 怜ちゃんはどっちがいい……？

translations.en: Rei-chan‚ which would you like?

script.text: どうして選択肢が極端なの？

translations.en: Why are you making me choose from two extraordinary ones?

script.text: 普通の手持ち花火をよこしなさいよ

translations.en: Hand me a normal hand sparkler.

script.text: 私はいろんな色に変わるのがいいな

translations.en: I like the ones that shine in lots of colors.

script.text: みんな楽しそうにはしゃいでるわね

translations.en: Everyone’s running around having fun.

script.text: 遙子さんは一緒に花火やらへんの？

translations.en: Why don't we do some fireworks with 'em‚ Haruko-san?

script.text: 私まで羽目を外したら

translations.en: If even I let myself go‚

script.text: 止める人がいなくなっちゃうでしょ？

translations.en: nobody would be left to stop them‚ right?

script.text: 遙子さんはほんまにサニピのお母……お姉さんやね

translations.en: Haruko-san‚ you're really like the mo… big sister to Sunny Peace.

script.text: それにしても、今日は一滴も雨が降らへんかったなぁ

translations.en: That reminds me‚ not a single drop of rain fell today.

script.text: ずっと晴れてたから

translations.en: It was sunny the whole time‚

script.text: 青空の下で歌うのが気持ち良かったわ

translations.en: so it felt great to be singing under a blue sky.

script.text: 新曲も凄く盛り上がって、今までの悪い思い出が

translations.en: The new song went over really well‚ and today was so much fun‚

script.text: 全部吹き飛んじゃうくらい、今日は楽しかった……

translations.en: it wiped away all my bad old memories.

script.text: 沖縄が苦手だったのは克服出来たみたいやな

translations.en: Looks like y'all overcame yer difficulty with Okinawa.

script.text: ええ、おかげで沖縄が大好きになっちゃった

translations.en: Yes‚ thanks to you‚ I really like the place now.

script.text: またみんなで沖縄に来たいわ

translations.en: I hope we all come here again.

script.text: ……優ちゃん、いろいろ助けてくれてありがとう

translations.en: Yu-chan‚ thanks for all your help.

script.text: 私は地味で華もなくて大事な所でいつも運が悪くて

translations.en: I’m plain with no glamor‚ and I always have bad luck when it really matters‚

script.text: こんな私がサニピにふさわしいのかなって

translations.en: so I’ve even wondered whether someone like me

script.text: 思ったこともあったけど……

translations.en: really belongs in Sunny Peace…

script.text: 今回の旅で、みんなが私を必要としてくれていると

translations.en: On this trip I realized that everyone needs me‚

script.text: 分かって嬉しかった

translations.en: and that makes me happy.

script.text: 今なら胸を張って、私はサニピの一員だって言えるわ

translations.en: Now I can say with pride that I’m a member of Sunny Peace.

script.text: ……遙子さんはもっと自信持ってええと思うわ

translations.en: I reckon you should have a whole lot more confidence in yerself.

script.text: 目の前にまぶしいほどの才能の塊がおって

translations.en: Y'all got all these talented prodigies in front of ya‚

script.text: それに比べて自分は地味で凡人やと思ってて……

translations.en: so ya feel plain and ordinary in comparison.

script.text: せやけど腐らずに一生懸命努力して

translations.en: But y'all work hard and do yer best‚

script.text: みんなからグループに不可欠な存在やと認められて……

translations.en: and everyone recognizes that y'all are an essential presence in the group.

script.text: そんなひたむきで頑張り屋な遙子さんのこと

translations.en: That earnest and hard-workin' Haruko-san is

script.text: うちは尊敬してるんよ

translations.en: someone I deeply respect.

script.text: ……ありがとう、優ちゃん

translations.en: Thanks‚ Yu-chan.

script.text: これからもお互い頑張ろうね

translations.en: Let’s both do our best from now on.

script.text: ……せやね

translations.en: …Yes‚ let's do that.

script.text: 今年はみんなと楽しい思い出が出来て最高の夏だったわ

translations.en: This year was the best summer ever‚ as I made fun memories with you all.

script.text: 何言うてんの。うちらの夏はまだまだこれからやろ

translations.en: What in tarnation are y'all talkin' about? This summer's just gettin' started

script.text: ……そうね、夏はまだ始まったばかりよね

translations.en: You’re right‚ summer just began.

script.text: これからもみんなと一緒に最高の夏を……！

translations.en: I’m going to go on having the best summer ever with you all.
